title: 40" Navy Blue Number 60 Balloon & 16p 12" Happy 60th Birthday Balloons for Women Men Lady Birthday Decorations 60 Year,Foil Large Number Balloon Latex Digital Balloons for Him Her 60th Birthday Party
features: 【60th Birthday Party Decorations】- 40 inch 6 and 0 oversized aluminium foil balloons, 16*12 inch very high quality latex balloons (8*Navy blue with gold age print balloons, 8*Gold confetti with black age print balloons) Free random 1 roll of ribbons, perfect for enhancing the birthday atmosphere in the party!

【Quality Material】-- The material of 40 inch 60 is aluminium foil, uniform colour, beautiful ball shape, safe and non-toxic. The balloons with digital prints, on the other hand, are made of high quality natural latex, non-toxic, harmless, thicker and more durable.

【The perfect combination of navy blue and gold】-- Elegant 60th birthday balloons are designed in navy blue and gold colours and are suitable for both men and women. The eye-catching navy blue and gold print stays vibrant and bold even after inflation. Add atmosphere to the 60th birthday theme party, sure to be the highlight to impress your guests and friends.

【Easy And Reusable】-- Digital balloons can be inflated with air or helium, no skill is needed, decorating your party is easy and convenient, after use, the gas in the balloon can be released, easy to store and reuse, the aluminium foil material reflects the light to make the balloons even more beautiful, providing the perfect display for your party, these aluminium foil balloons and latex balloons are sturdy and durable, you can hang these balloons from ceilings ceiling, mounted on walls and windows, or used as table centrepieces to decorate your various parties. TIP: Colourful confetti will stick to the balloons by rubbing them with your clothes or hair before inflation.

【Warm Tips】-- In order to achieve the floating effect, helium is required. Please note that helium is not included in the package. Avoid over-inflation and keep away from sunlight, heat and sharp objects to prevent bursting. Secure the balloon tail after tying for longer durability
